content: Dear Zulip Category Theorists, do not forget to send your abstract to Topology, Algebra, and Categories in Logic 2026. Deadline is soon, on 9 March 2026!
Would you consider on-topic one of my papers on categories of automata?
Yes, absolutely, that will fit there nicely. Moreover, it would also go well in the ESSLLI 2026 workshop that I'm organising in Prague: https://tomas.jakl.one/events/esslli-2026-workshop
That's wonderful, I miss Prague... :heart:
